regime_justification: USDJPY pinned at 160.07, just above historical MOF watch line; BOJ hike 97% priced for June 16; vol subdued but JGB yields elevated at 2.65%; carry intact but intervention risk elevated

domino_stage.label: Pre-Intervention
domino_stage.justification: USDJPY at 160.07—kissing the MOF watch line; BOJ meeting in <24 hours with 97% hike probability; JGB 10Y at 2.65% near multi-decade highs; FX vol muted despite event risk

1w.label: Likely
1w.driver: BOJ hike June 16 (97% priced); historical pattern: every hike since 2024 triggered 23-31% BTC drop; USDJPY at 160 watchline

2w.label: Likely
2w.driver: Post-hike unwind window; if BOJ signals further tightening or MOF intervenes on pace, carry liquidation accelerates

3w.label: Watchful
3w.driver: Scenario-weighted: hike absorbed smoothly OR follow-through unwind continues; spread compression path depends on Fed/BOJ divergence

4w.label: Watchful
4w.driver: Tail risk elevated but not imminent; if BOJ one-and-done, carry stabilizes; if hawkish guidance, Stage 4 entry possible

bottom_line: Stage 2 lock: USDJPY at 160.07, BOJ hike 97% priced for June 16, JGB at 2.65%. Every BOJ hike since March 2024 has crushed BTC 23-31%. Spread still 187 bps but compressed vol (unavailable) masks complacency. Oil collapse to $79.85 eases ¥/bbl pressure but doesn't repair carry fundamentals. 1-2 week grades hold at B (Likely): the trigger is cocked, the catalyst is scheduled. Crypto liquidity holding (BTC $65.2k) but fragile—no meaningful deleveraging yet. Watch BOJ tone June 16 and USDJPY pace post-decision.

trigger_map.note: WTI collapsed to $79.85 on US-Iran deal talk; ¥/bbl down 6%; imported inflation relief, not a trigger now

narrative.p1: USDJPY at 160.07, down 0.10% but just 7 pips above the MOF's historical watch line. Oil plunged 5.9% to $79.85 on US-Iran peace deal speculation, dragging ¥/bbl import costs down 6% to ¥12,782 and easing one pressure valve. But the real event is tomorrow: BOJ meeting with 97% probability of a 25bp hike to 1.0%—the highest rate since 1995. Governor Ueda is hospitalized (hepatic cyst infection); Finance Minister Katayama confirmed the meeting proceeds as planned. No meaningful rhetoric shift from MOF or BOJ in the past 24 hours, but silence at 160 is the loudest signal—they're watching. JGB 10Y eased 3 bps to 2.65% (one-week low) but remains near the 2.8% May peak. Stage unchanged at 2 (Pre-Intervention): the dominos are stacked, the catalyst is T-1 day.
narrative.p2: Quant anchors: US-JP 10Y spread at 187 bps (4.43% - 2.65%), down 9 bps on JGB compression. USDJPY 1M implied vol unavailable in search results, but MOVE at 69.4 (below 80) and VIX at 19.5 signal complacency in both rates and equity vol—classic pre-event calm. USDJPY 5-day change negligible (~0% based on historical range 160.02-160.53 June 4-11), meaning the pair is coiling, not breaking. Distance from 60d mean: neutral to slightly stretched. Carry-to-vol proxy cannot be computed without IV data, but the setup is fragile: spread still wide, but BOJ normalization path compresses it structurally. Grades 1w/2w hold at B (Likely) because the historical pattern is brutal—March 2024 hike: BTC -23%; July 2024: -25-30%; Jan 2025: -31%; Dec 2025: -25%. The hike is 97% priced, but the *tone* and follow-through guidance are not. Applied unwind prior: data is genuinely mixed (oil relief vs. BOJ event risk), so the prior leans the grade from C to B for weeks 1-2. Weeks 3-4 stay at C (Watchful) because the scenario tree branches: hike absorbed smoothly and spreads stabilize, OR BOJ signals July follow-up and carry liquidation cascades into Stage 4.
narrative.p3: BTC at $65,185, up 0.9% daily and 5.3% weekly—holding the $65k floor but showing zero deleveraging ahead of the BOJ decision. XRP outperforming at $1.19, +3.1%, with volatility compression near $1.14 signaling either a breakout or a trap. The strength is risk-on rotation, not safe-haven flight, which makes it fragile. BTC open interest direction unavailable, but the lack of pre-event hedging (low MOVE, low FX vol) suggests complacency or max short already deployed. Crypto liquidity sympathy: if the BOJ hikes and signals patience (one-and-done), BTC likely tests $70k on relief. If the BOJ hints at July acceleration or MOF intervenes post-hike on USDJPY pace, the historical -25% pattern targets $48-50k. Positioning implication: trim size into the meeting, keep dry powder for the June 17-20 window when the unwind either fires or fizzles. The calm is the tell.

horizon_rationale.w1_w2: Week 1 stays B because the BOJ hike is T-1 day and 97% priced; the risk is tone, not the 25bp itself. Week 2 holds B because every hike since March 2024 has triggered 23-31% BTC corrections within 2 weeks, and USDJPY is at the MOF watch line—pace acceleration post-hike = intervention trigger. The unwind prior applies here: ambiguous data (oil relief vs. event risk), so we lean alert.
horizon_rationale.w2_w3: Week 2 to 3 softens from B to C as the scenario tree opens: if BOJ signals one-and-done and USDJPY stabilizes below 160, the hike is absorbed and carry limps on (C). If the BOJ hints at July follow-up or MOF intervenes, we're in Stage 3-4 and grades flip back to B or A. The 3-week grade is scenario-weighted, not a forecast.
horizon_rationale.w3_w4: Week 3 to 4 holds at C because by late June, either the unwind has cascaded (and we're in Stage 4-5, not C), or the hike was digested and spreads/vol normalize. The tail risk remains elevated (JGB at 2.65%, fiscal stress unresolved, Fed still on hold), but without a fresh catalyst, C is the modal outcome. If new data breaks badly (China devaluation, ME flare-up), the grade lifts.

watch_list: BOJ statement tone June 16: look for language on 'gradual' vs. 'data-dependent'; any hint of July hike accelerates unwind
USDJPY pace post-decision: if pair jumps >1% in 24h, MOF intervention probability spikes; watch for Katayama/Kanda rate-checks
JGB 10Y break above 2.75%: signals fiscal stress overwhelming BOJ taper pace; equities/crypto would follow
BTC reaction June 16-17: historical pattern is -5 to -10% within 48h of BOJ hike; sub-$62k breaks the $65k floor
US-Iran deal headlines: current oil relief is speculation; reversal sends WTI back to $90+ and reignites ¥/bbl pressure
